overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a nighttime rooftop gathering around a large bonfire, with a futuristic cyberpunk city skyline featuring illuminated twin towers visible in the background. The footage shows a nomadic group socializing in a makeshift camp, with warm firelight contrasting against the cool blue atmospheric night lighting.

segments.scene_description: A static nighttime scene on a rooftop overlooking a futuristic city, where a group of people gather around a large central bonfire. The warm firelight illuminates the characters and contrasts with the cool blue glow of the distant illuminated skyscrapers. Various makeshift seating arrangements including chairs and barrels are scattered around the fire, while distinctive windmill structures stand on poles at the edges of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a nighttime rooftop gathering that emphasizes the contrast between intimate warmth and a vast, futuristic urban expanse. It begins by focusing on a group of people clustered around a large central bonfire, where the flickering orange light illuminates the characters and their makeshift seating of chairs and barrels. As the eye wanders outward, the warm glow of the fire gives way to the cool blue atmospheric lighting of the surrounding rooftop. The scene then expands to reveal distinctive windmill structures standing on poles at the edges of the frame, before finally settling on the distant, illuminated skyscrapers of a cyberpunk city skyline.
